name: Vermillimon

signature_move.name: Volcano Strike S
signature_move.description: Shoots a fireball more powerful than Monochromon's at the enemy.

description: An Ankylosaur Digimon with a huge horn. It is thought to be the evolved form of Monochromon that live near volcanoes, and its armor-like skin, which is as hard as a diamond, has also grown resistant to heat from volcanoes. Its Special Moves are shooting a fireball more powerful than Monochromon's at the enemy ( Volcano Strike S ), and charging fiercely and then violently ramming them with its horn ( Hard Tackle ).
